text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇵🇰🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱 Al Arabiya Report (Unconfirmed): Journalist Abdullah Khalouf Claims Asim Munir Visited Tehran Over Intelligence on Israeli Limited Nuclear Strikes" 🇸🇦 Al Arabiya is a Saudi owned media.

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Al Arabiya Report (Unconfirmed): Journalist Abdullah Khalouf Claims Asim Munir Visited Tehran Over Intelligence on Israeli Limited Nuclear Strikes

text: German‑based media group Axel Springer SE, which is acquiring The Daily Telegraph, outlined mandatory “core values” for staff. These include explicit support for Israel. Some quotes from his letter to the staff: There is no such thing as neutral journalism. We support the right of Israel to exist. NOTE: Axel Springer also owns media groups like Bild, Die Welt, Politico, and Business Insider. SOURCE
text_zh: 总部位于德国的媒体集团阿克塞尔·斯普林格（Axel Springer SE）正在收购《每日电讯报》，该集团为其员工制定了强制性的“核心价值观”。其中包括明确支持以色列。以下是他致员工信中的一些引述：不存在所谓的中立新闻。我们支持以色列的生存权。注：阿克塞尔·斯普林格还拥有《图片报》、《世界报》、《政客》和《商业内幕》等媒体集团。来源

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @JayinKyiv : Fires at Russia's Back Sea port of Tuapse continue to expand, now burning since late last night. https://twitter.com/JayinKyiv/status/2044728997649555643/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @JayinKyiv：俄罗斯图阿普谢黑海港口的火灾持续蔓延，自昨晚深夜起一直在燃烧。https://twitter.com/JayinKyiv/status/2044728997649555643/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🤡 🇸🇮 Slovenia’s newly elected parliamentary speaker has announced plans to visit Russia and push for the country’s withdrawal from NATO. 🔹 Speaker Zoran Stevanović, leader of the eurosceptic Resnica party, said he intends to travel to Moscow soon to “build bridges” between the West and the East. 🔹 He also announced a referendum on Slovenia leaving the alliance, which it joined in 2004. 🔹 Stevanović supports the gradual lifting of sanctions on Russia, describing his stance as “pro-Slovenian.” 🔹 His election came as a surprise, as Prime Minister Golob’s pro-European bloc won the elections, but required Resnica’s support to form a coalition. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🤡 🇸🇮 斯洛文尼亚新当选的议会议长宣布计划访问俄罗斯，并推动该国退出北约。🔹 议长佐兰·斯特瓦诺维奇（Zoran Stevanović）是欧洲怀疑论政党 Resnica 的领导人，他表示打算近期前往莫斯科，在东西方之间“架起桥梁”。🔹 他还宣布将就斯洛文尼亚退出该联盟（于2004年加入）举行全民公投。🔹 斯特瓦诺维奇支持逐步解除对俄制裁，称其立场为“亲斯洛文尼亚”。🔹 他的当选令人意外，因为戈洛布总理的亲欧集团赢得了选举，但需要 Resnica 的支持才能组建联合政府。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. forces withdrawing from the Kasrak base in Hasakah, Syria, to Jordan. Much of the material inside the base was destroyed prior to departure. The base will be handed over to the 60th Division under the command of Çiya Kobani. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044729016590987736/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美军正从叙利亚哈塞克的卡斯拉克（Kasrak）基地撤往约旦。基地内的大部分物资在撤离前已被销毁。该基地将移交给由齐亚·科巴尼（Çiya Kobani）指挥的第60师。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044729016590987736/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese President Joseph Aoun, in a meeting with the British Minister of State for the Middle East, said the ceasefire Lebanon is demanding from Israel would be "the natural entry point for direct negotiations between the two countries, in line with the Lebanese presidential initiative." He added that Israeli withdrawal from Lebanese territory is "an essential step to ensuring the ceasefire, completing the deployment of the Lebanese army to the international borders, and fully establishing state authority, while ending all expressions of armed presence." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）在与英国中东事务国务大臣会晤时表示，黎巴嫩要求以色列实现的停火将是“根据黎巴嫩总统倡议，两国进行直接谈判的自然切入点”。他补充说，以色列从黎巴嫩领土撤军是“确保停火、完成黎巴嫩军队在国际边界的部署、全面建立国家权威并结束所有武装存在表现的关键一步”。推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: The Israeli Air Force eliminated Ahmad Abu Khatzira, a commander in Hamas's communications unit in Gaza City, in an airstrike two days ago. Abu Khatzira was involved in advancing immediate terror attacks against IDF forces. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044727573234565195/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军（IDF）：以色列空军两天前在一次空袭中消灭了哈马斯加沙城通信部门指挥官艾哈迈德·阿布·哈齐拉（Ahmad Abu Khatzira）。阿布·哈齐拉曾参与策划针对以色列国防军部队的即时恐怖袭击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044727573234565195/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Soldiers located dozens of weapons across Hezbollah infrastructure sites, RPGs, Kalashnikov rifles, ammunition, grenades, an anti-aircraft missile, and surveillance equipment. After completing searches, approximately 70 terror infrastructure sites were dismantled in one minute. Dozens of terrorists were eliminated in a separate operation. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军（IDF）：士兵在真主党的多个基础设施点发现了数十件武器，包括火箭筒（RPG）、卡拉什尼科夫步枪、弹药、手榴弹、一枚防空导弹和监视设备。搜查完成后，约70个恐怖基础设施点在一分钟内被拆除。在另一次行动中，数十名恐怖分子被消灭。推文

text: WarTranslated The aftermath of an overnight Russian attack using drones and ballistic missiles: In Kyiv, 5 people were killed, including a child, and 21 others were injured. Destruction was reported across four districts, with cars catching fire and damage to a warehouse, a tire repair shop, and a store. tweet

text: Open Source Intel IRGC: "If necessary, Iran can sink all US ships in the Persian Gulf that are within the range of its missiles." tweet

text: 🇮🇷 Iran Army Executive Deputy, Brigadier General Sheikh: Army's destructive drone production increased 10 times. The production rate of our destructive drones in the 7 months after the twelve-day war was 10 times that of the period before it. All operational plans executed in the third imposed war were written by the martyr Lieutenant General Mousavi 7 months before this war and communicated to all forces including Aerospace and the Army. If the enemy wants to carry out an operation again, the Islamic Republic system will undoubtedly counter it with the foresight it has previously made.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗陆军执行副司令谢赫准将：陆军破坏性无人机的产量增加了10倍。我们在十二天战争后7个月内破坏性无人机的生产率是战前时期的10倍。第三次强加战争中执行的所有作战计划，都是由烈士穆萨维中将在战争前7个月编写的，并传达给了包括航空航天部队和陆军在内的所有部队。如果敌人想再次进行行动，伊斯兰共和国体制无疑将以其预先做出的远见卓识进行反击。

text: 🇮🇷 Spokesperson of the Iranian Army: Amir Hatami ordered that in the event of a ground invasion of the country, not a single invader should be left alive. Brigadier General Akraminia said in a televised interview that he must especially remember the martyrs who were killed in the operation to counter American infiltration in southern Isfahan. We lost four martyrs there; Second Brigadier General Masoud Zare, a professor and commander of the Army Ground Force Air Defense Faculty, bravely entered that operation. The order also came from the Commander-in-Chief of the Islamic Republic of Iran Army that if a ground invasion of the country occurs, it must be dealt with seriously, and he emphasized that not a single invader should be left alive.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗军队发言人：阿米尔·哈塔米下令，如果发生针对该国的地面入侵，绝不能让任何一名入侵者活着离开。阿克拉米尼亚准将在电视采访中表示，他必须特别铭记在反击美国渗透伊朗南部伊斯法罕的行动中牺牲的烈士。我们在那里失去了四位烈士；陆军地面部队防空学院教授兼指挥官马苏德·扎雷准将勇敢地参加了那次行动。伊朗伊斯兰共和国军队总司令也下达了命令，如果发生针对该国的地面入侵，必须严肃对待，并强调绝不能让任何一名入侵者活着离开。

text: NEW: Türkiye announces it will increase its number of commando brigades. New brigades will be structured differently from existing ones, designed to better match current threats and modern operational concepts. Earlier reports speculate on targets like adding 15 new brigades.
text_zh: 最新消息：土耳其宣布将增加其突击旅的数量。新组建的旅将采用与现有旅不同的结构，旨在更好地适应当前的威胁和现代作战概念。早先的报道推测目标包括增加15个新旅。

text: BREAKING: The U.S. appears to have ended its military presence in Syria with the last convoy leaving the Qasrak base in the northeast. Control of the area is now shifting to Syrian forces. This effectively ends the U.S. ground presence that began in 2014.
text_zh: 突发：美国似乎已结束其在叙利亚的军事存在，最后一支车队已离开位于东北部的卡斯拉克（Qasrak）基地。该地区的控制权现正移交给叙利亚军队。这实际上结束了自2014年开始的美国地面存在。

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Pakistani Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir is reportedly set to visit Washington tomorrow following a trip to Iran, as part of regional mediation efforts, a Pakistani security source told Al Jazeera.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据半岛电视台援引巴基斯坦安全消息人士的话报道，巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅在访问伊朗后，据称将于明天访问华盛顿，作为地区调解努力的一部分。

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Pakistani Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir met with Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf in Tehran on Thursday.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅周四在德黑兰会见了伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Genocide in Lebanon! Israeli warplanes strike Al-Qasmiyeh Bridge, southern Lebanon.

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Givati Brigade troops operating in Bint Jbeil located more than 130 Hezbollah weapons inside a school, including Kalashnikovs, pistols, and other firearms. The weapons were confiscated as forces continue targeted operations to dismantle Hezbollah infrastructure. The IDF says Hezbollah uses civilian sites to carry out attacks against Israeli civilians and troops. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军：吉瓦提旅（Givati Brigade）部队在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）行动时，在一所学校内发现了130多件真主党武器，包括卡拉什尼科夫冲锋枪、手枪和其他枪支。随着部队继续进行旨在拆除真主党基础设施的定点行动，这些武器已被没收。以色列国防军称，真主党利用民用场所对以色列平民和军队发动袭击。推文

text: Open Source Intel REUTERS CLAIMS: Analysts say Iran could sustain a halt in oil exports for up to two months before being forced to cut production. BREAKING 🔴 🔴 USNAVCENT expands the Iran blockade worldwide. Iranian vessels, OFAC sanctioned ships, and suspected contraband carriers can now be boarded and seized by U.S. forces anywhere, with the move targeting Iran’s shadow fleet of more than 570 tankers. Key points • Blockade in force since April 13 now applies worldwide under belligerent rights • Neutral flagged vessels tied to Iran or sanctions also at risk • $400M + per day in Iranian oil revenue at risk • Nearly 90% of Iran’s trade is sea based • Rising risk of economic collapse and currency crisis Source: USNAVCENT / NCAGS advisory via Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand), April 16, 2026; m - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：路透社声称：分析人士表示，伊朗在被迫减产之前，可以维持石油出口中断长达两个月。突发 🔴 🔴 美国海军中央司令部（USNAVCENT）将伊朗封锁范围扩大至全球。伊朗船只、受美国外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁的船只以及涉嫌走私的船只现在可以在任何地方被美军登船并扣押，此举旨在针对伊朗超过570艘油轮的“影子船队”。要点 • 自4月13日起生效的封锁现根据交战权适用于全球 • 与伊朗或制裁有关的悬挂中立国旗帜的船只也面临风险 • 每天超过4亿美元的伊朗石油收入面临风险 • 伊朗近90%的贸易依赖海运 • 经济崩溃和货币危机的风险上升 来源：美国海军中央司令部 / NCAGS 咨询，通过 Seatrade Maritime（Marcus Hand），2026年4月16日；m - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel The FAA is investigating an incident after two pilots were heard meowing and barking on an emergency aviation frequency. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044719330156265559/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国联邦航空管理局（FAA）正在调查一起事件，此前有两名飞行员在紧急航空频率上发出猫叫声和狗叫声。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044719330156265559/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF soldier raises the Israeli flag on hilltops overlooking a village near Manara, Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044718333077942327/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩马纳拉（Manara）附近的一个村庄俯瞰的山顶上竖起以色列国旗。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044718333077942327/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. Treasury sanctioned an oil smuggling network run by Mohammad Hossein Shamkhani, son of the now-deceased senior Iranian security official Ali Shamkhani. Treasury also sanctioned targets tied to a Hizballah gold scheme that ultimately benefits Iran's military. Both actions fall under Operation Economic Fury. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国财政部制裁了一个由已故伊朗高级安全官员阿里·沙姆哈尼（Ali Shamkhani）之子穆罕默德·侯赛因·沙姆哈尼（Mohammad Hossein Shamkhani）运营的石油走私网络。财政部还制裁了与真主党黄金计划有关的目标，该计划最终使伊朗军方受益。这两项行动均属于“经济愤怒行动”（Operation Economic Fury）。推文

text: Open Source Intel This a whole new level of choking the regime. Iranian shadow tankers are now being targeted. Wondering how this affects the negotiations. BREAKING 🔴 🔴 USNAVCENT expands the Iran blockade worldwide. Iranian vessels, OFAC sanctioned ships, and suspected contraband carriers can now be boarded and seized by U.S. forces anywhere, with the move targeting Iran’s shadow fleet of more than 570 tankers. Key points • Blockade in force since April 13 now applies worldwide under belligerent rights • Neutral flagged vessels tied to Iran or sanctions also at risk • $400M + per day in Iranian oil revenue at risk • Nearly 90% of Iran’s trade is sea based • Rising risk of economic collapse and currency crisis Source: USNAVCENT / NCAGS advisory via Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand), April 16, 2026; m - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：这是扼杀该政权的一个全新水平。伊朗的影子油轮现在成为目标。想知道这如何影响谈判。突发 🔴 🔴 美国海军中央司令部（USNAVCENT）将伊朗封锁范围扩大至全球。伊朗船只、受美国外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁的船只以及涉嫌走私的船只现在可以在任何地方被美军登船并扣押，此举旨在针对伊朗超过570艘油轮的“影子船队”。要点 • 自4月13日起生效的封锁现根据交战权适用于全球 • 与伊朗或制裁有关的悬挂中立国旗帜的船只也面临风险 • 每天超过4亿美元的伊朗石油收入面临风险 • 伊朗近90%的贸易依赖海运 • 经济崩溃和货币危机的风险上升 来源：美国海军中央司令部 / NCAGS 咨询，通过 Seatrade Maritime（Marcus Hand），2026年4月16日；m - 开源情报推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Marines conduct live hoist training on the flight deck of America-class amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA 7). Tripoli and its 3,500 Sailors and embarked Marines are executing the mission to blockade ships entering and departing Iranian ports. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044716931890967033/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：美国海军陆战队在“美国”级两栖攻击舰“的黎波里”号（USS Tripoli, LHA 7）的飞行甲板上进行实地吊装训练。“的黎波里”号及其3500名水手和随舰海军陆战队员正在执行封锁进出伊朗港口船只的任务。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044716931890967033/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Based on the volume of jets overhead in northern Israel today, there appears to be a major air campaign underway over Lebanon. Hezbollah is definitely getting hit very hard. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：根据今天以色列北部上空喷气式飞机的数量，黎巴嫩上空似乎正在进行一场大规模的空中战役。真主党肯定受到了非常沉重的打击。推文

text: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian has emphasized China's support for Iran's sovereignty, security, and legal rights in the Strait of Hormuz, urging that they be respected and protected as a critical window for peace opens in the region.
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 中国外交部发言人林剑强调了中国对伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的主权、安全和合法权利的支持，敦促在地区和平的关键窗口期，这些权利应得到尊重和保护。

text: Open Source Intel IRGC General Esmail Kowsari says Iran could reroute oil exports through Russia if blocked in the Strait of Hormuz, pointing to how Moscow used Iranian channels during the Ukraine war. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044715915728617613/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）将军伊斯梅尔·科萨里（Esmail Kowsari）表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡被封锁，伊朗可以通过俄罗斯转运石油出口，并指出莫斯科在乌克兰战争期间是如何利用伊朗渠道的。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044715915728617613/video/1 推文

text: Pro-Israel megadonor Miriam Adelson donated $40 million to Republican super PACs to help the party maintain control of Congress. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 亲以色列的大额捐款人米里亚姆·阿德尔森（Miriam Adelson）向共和党超级政治行动委员会捐赠了4000万美元，以帮助该党保持对国会的控制。来源：彭博社

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF announced that troops located more than 130 weapons inside a school in southern Lebanon during operations in the Bint Jbeil area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，部队在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）地区的行动中，在黎巴嫩南部的一所学校内发现了130多件武器。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 So... Pete Hegseth uses a fake Bible verse from "Pulp Fiction" for a prayer during a Pentagon meeting. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 所以……皮特·海格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）在五角大楼的一次会议上，竟然引用了电影《低俗小说》中的伪造圣经经文来进行祈祷。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Pete Hegseth quoted a fake Bible verse from Pulp Fiction during a Pentagon sermon.
text_zh: 皮特·海格塞斯在五角大楼的布道中引用了《低俗小说》里的伪造圣经经文。
